rows.label: tlk70000074_02_msg0001
rows.name:
His Majesty vested me with the
duties of special envoy on this
occasion. I am much obliged to him.

rows.label: tlk70000074_02_msg0002
rows.name:
The emperor's retainers on
this warship are the best
this country has to offer.

rows.label: tlk70000074_02_msg0003
rows.name:
They consider it a great honor to
be chosen to serve the emperor.

rows.label: tlk70000074_02_msg0004
rows.name:
But that Inquisitor is different...
He serves not Emperor Hugo, but
his cold, callous brother.

rows.label: tlk70000074_02_msg0005
rows.name:
How cold of his brother, to send a
consul just to confirm Hugo-sama's
death and recover imperial Cores.

rows.label: tlk70000074_02_msg0006
rows.name:
I have sworn from hence
forth to devote myself to
serving the emperor...

rows.label: tlk70000074_02_msg0007
rows.name:
I beseech you to do all you
can to protect his life.
